description.a: the constant in the radical form (a^2 +/- x^2 or x^2 - a^2)
description.u: an auxiliary substitution variable when needed

subscript_convention: a denotes the constant under the radical, so that sqrt(a^2 - x^2), sqrt(a^2 + x^2), or sqrt(x^2 - a^2) selects the sine, tangent, or secant substitution respectively.
